ddt:Target.Name: EPS6_HCB_DHN_SWEET400_05.09.2022
ddt:Target.Description:
05/11/2021 : Création de la base DTT EPS6 19/08/2022 : Mise à jour de la base DDT avec les swepl delivery darline.d.gatchueng-kemdjo-extern@renault.com et hend.triki-extern@renault.com 2022-9-13 Identification added by tool (CORP\p112778) => DiagVersion=186, Supplier=A202 , Soft=BA017s_U005_EIPF0 , Version=BA017s_U005_EIPF0_EIPF0
2022-9-13 Identification added by tool (CORP\p112778) => DiagVersion=186, Supplier=A202 , Soft=BA017s_U011_JEUA1 , Version=BA017s_U011_JEUA1_BCB1S
2022-9-15 Identification added by tool (CORP\p112778) => DiagVersion=186, Supplier=A202 , Soft=BA017s_U011_JEUA1 , Version=BA017s_U011_JEUA1_BCB1N

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(high byte)
Data.Comment: Extract a list of higher bytes supported for read access in current session

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for WriteDataByIdentifier(high byte)
Data.Comment: Extract a list of higher bytes supported for write access in current session

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)2
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper 01(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)1
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper 01(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)C1
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper C1(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)DA
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper 01(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)EF
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper 01(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)F0
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper 01(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)F1
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper F1(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Data.Name: Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)FD
Data.Comment: Extract a list of lower bytes for upper FD(for ReadDataByIdentifier)

Item.Text: internal failure confirmed or protection function occured (Assistance_enable_level < safe_ssiste_level)

Data.Name: Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset
EPS_SWA manual L2L recovery occurrences counter
FlashMemorybankNumber
Data.Comment: Indicate SW bank

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked
(U0076) CAN BUSS OFF Fault on 1ch(For DiagMux DTC)
(C165C) EPS is in very soft ramp down mode(sub)
(C163D) Missing or unreliable control requests for APA (AVM Failure)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: OutputControlCommandOptionalData
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineStatus
Data.Comment: Routine Status (Routine Info)

Data.Name: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Hardware wakeup status (main)
Data.Comment: hardware wakeup status

Data.Name: CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)
Data.Comment: The Ignition / AutoACC logical value, as received through CAN network.

Data.Name: External angle sensor
Data.Comment: DID_$015A

Data.Name: Mileage at first occurrence
Data.Comment: the mileage of the first occurence given by the steering wheel

Data.Name: CAN_DTC_filter1 (main)
Data.Comment: the value of the internal corresponding parameter.

Data.Name: CAN_DTC_filter2 (main)
Data.Comment: the value of the internal corresponding parameter.

Data.Name: Fingerprint
Data.Comment: Only for programmable ECU
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Data.Comment: DRC14 - (when delivery 0000000000)

Data.Name: Resume flag, address, size
Data.Comment: Used for resume function of OTA

Data.Name: Fotable data
Data.Comment: Read fotable data

Data.Name: Configuration Signature
Data.Comment: Used for signature verification of $F0B0 "Configuration FOTA MegaFrame" of OTA

Data.Name: Configuration FOTA MegaFrame
Data.Comment: Contains all parameters to be configured in OTA

Data.Name: JTEKT_VirginFlag
Data.Comment: DID only for JTEKT internal use

Data.Name: R Counter Reset
Data.Comment: Reset flash counter and DTC status

Data.Name: Internal Fault_F tables main1
Data.Comment: Confirm internal fault code F table(fault related to application)

Data.Name: Internal Fault_E tables main1
Data.Comment: Confirm internal fault code E table

Data.Name: Digest1
Data.Comment: [DRC14] (to determine which logical block shall be downloaded)

Item.Text: Steering angle not following to command

Request.Name: DataRead.Internal EPS steering wheel velocity
Request.Comment: Read Internal EPS steering wheel velocity

Request.Name: DataRead.Reset Pull-Drift long-term assisance torque
Request.Comment: Read Reset Pull-Drift long-term assisance torque

Request.Name: DataWrite.Reset Pull-Drift long-term assisance torque
Request.Comment: Write Reset Pull-Drift long-term assisance torque

Request.Name: DataRead.Internal EPS steering wheel angle
Request.Comment: Read Internal EPS steering wheel angle

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle corrected
Request.Comment: Read CAN Steering wheel angle corrected

Request.Name: DataRead.EPS_SWA manual L2L recovery occurrences counter
Request.Comment: Read EPS_SWA manual L2L recovery occurrences counter

DataItem.Name: EPS_SWA manual L2L recovery occurrences counter

Request.Name: DataRead.EPS_SWA Rack Stroke from recovery
Request.Comment: Read EPS_SWA Rack Stroke from recovery

Request.Name: DataRead.LKA request outside safety limits
Request.Comment: Read LKA request outside safety limits

Request.Name: DataRead.Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset
Request.Comment: Read Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset

DataItem.Name: Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset

Request.Name: DataWrite.Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset
Request.Comment: Write Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset

DataItem.Name: Reset Internal Steering wheel angle offset

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

DataItem.Name: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)
Request.Comment: Read $132 CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)

DataItem.Name: CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)

Request.Name: DataRead.Internal fault store (last 10 minor faults)
Request.Comment: Read internal fault store (last 10 minor faults)

Request.Name: DataRead.Internal Steering wheel angle offset
Request.Comment: Read Internal Steering wheel angle offset

Request.Name: DataWrite.Internal Steering wheel angle offset
Request.Comment: Write Internal Steering wheel angle offset

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(high byte)

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for WriteDataByIdentifier(low byte)FD

Request.Name: DataRead.Supported Identifiers for RoutineControl(high byte)02
Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for RoutineControl(high byte)02

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for RoutineControl(high byte)03

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for RoutineControl(high byte)F0

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for RoutineControl(high byte)FF

Request.Comment: Read Supported Identifiers for ReadDataByIdentifier(low byte)CO

Device.Name: (C165C) EPS is in very soft ramp down mode(sub)
